revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1236205778|1236205778]] by [[Special:Contributions/Primefac|Primefac]] ([[User talk:Primefac|talk]]) rvt, change contested
Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1236205778|1236205778]] by [[Special:Contributions/Primefac|Primefac]] ([[User talk:Primefac|talk]]) rvt, change contested
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1236205778|1236205778]] by [[Special:Contributions/Primefac|Primefac]] ([[User talk:Primefac|talk]]) rvt, change contested
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23703150061|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Circa here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{sortable|}}} |{{padleft:{{{1|}}}|4|0}}  }}{{#switch:{{{lk|}}} |no|off = c. |yes|on = [[wikt:circa#English|c.]] |abbr |#default = c. }}{{#ifeq:{{{1|+}}}|{{{1|-}}} | {{trim|{{{1}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}} | – c. {{{2}}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Circa]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | i | lk | sortable }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Pages using circa with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
